Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[de:Renutet]][[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Renutet-qq]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:bump 1-25]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: - '''"Lady of the Granary"''' - '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' - '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[de:Renutet]][[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Renutet-qq]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:bump 1-25]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}

'''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[de:Renutet]][[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq-Renutet-qq]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:bump 1-25]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: - '''"Lady of the Granary"''' - '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' - '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[de:Renutet]][[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq-Renutet-->[[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:bump 1-25]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]]

Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:qq deprecated start]][[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:bump 1-25]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}}

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: - '''"Lady of the Granary"''' - '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' - '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:bump 1-25]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}}

Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}}

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: - '''"Lady of the Granary"''' - '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' - '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}}

Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}}

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: - '''"Lady of the Granary"''' - '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' - '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}}

Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: * '''"Lady of the Granary"''' * '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' * '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]]

Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: * '''"Lady of the Granary"''' * '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' * '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category: tier 4]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: * '''"Lady of the Granary"''' * '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' * '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also! == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category: tier 4]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category: tier 4]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] to [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: * '''"Lady of the Granary"''' * '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' * '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category: tier 4]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]]

In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. {{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = r:n-Z7-t:t |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}
''Rnwtt''
''The Nourishing One'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1 S-N35B
1-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''1-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''First month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-M17-M17:X1-M33
Wepet-em-asech-ati |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-jtj'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}} harvest'' |IMAGE1 = Illustration Hordeum vulgare0.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 210px }} '''Renutet''' ("The Nourishing One") denoted in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender}} the beginning of the harvest season and the first month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|lt=Shemu|de|Schemu}} period as the "nourishing month." From the {{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)}} until the end of the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich}}, Renutet, originally the ninth month of the {{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender}}, corresponded to the period from early {{ill|February|de|Februar}} to early {{ill|March|de|März}}. == History == {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}} theorized that Renutet underwent a calendrical shift over time, eventually moving to the eighth month by the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich}}. In the {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender}}, dated to around '''1517 BCE''', Renutet corresponded to the third {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)}} month, spanning from '''February 14 to March 15''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine}}) and '''February 19 to March 20''' ({{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)}}). == Significance == Renutet, identified with the goddess {{ill|Renenutet|de|Renenutet}}, was revered as: * '''"Lady of the Granary"''' * '''"Lady of the Fertile Land"''' * '''"Lady of the Harvest Blessing"''' During the harvest, the Egyptians made offerings to her. '''Stelae found in granaries and field boundaries''' provide evidence of this cult. The '''{{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest}}''' was later celebrated on '''{{ill|Pa-en-Renenutet|lt=Pharmouthi|de|Pharmouthi}} 27''', known as the '''"Day of Measuring the {{ill|barley|de|Gerste}}."''' In the '''Theban calendar''', this corresponded to '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} 1 (Pachon 1).''' Additionally, as a '''fertility goddess''', Renenutet was credited with ensuring the '''"emergence of flax."''' Because flax was processed into linen, she also bore the titles '''"Lady of the Garments"''' and '''"Overseer of the Temple's Clothing Chamber,"''' referring to the belief that gods were clothed in '''"the garment of Renenutet."''' Records from the '''{{ill|Solar Temple of Niuserre|de|Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre}}''' indicate that the '''barley harvest''' took place in '''February and March.'''{{ill|Elmar Edel|de|Elmar Edel}}: ''Zu den Inschriften auf den Jahreszeitenreliefs der „Weltkammer“ aus dem Sonnenheiligtum des Niuserre, Teil 2.'' In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950. == Notes == {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} [[Category:Month of the Ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian lunar months]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Harvest festivals]] [[de:Renutet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category: tier 4]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]] [[de:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:Renutet]][[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] [[ru:%D0%A0%D0%B5%D0%BD%D1%83%D1%82%D0%B5%D1%82]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:11]] {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[sn:Renutet]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Renutet]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

In: ''Nachrichten der Akademie der Wissenschaften in Göttingen.'' No. 5. Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, Göttingen 1964, p. 200. == Name Change == The '''first Shemu month''' was later renamed '''{{ill|Pa-en-Chonsu|de|Pa-en-Chonsu}} (Pachon).''' == See Also == * {{ill|Tebtunis lunar calendar|de|Tebtunis-Mondkalender}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}}. * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker|12=draft}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.''
